---
title: "Resources"
pagetitle: "Resources"
toc-location: left
toc-title: ""
title-block-banner: "#EE6A24"
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: '<meta name="description" content="Resources built and maintained by Serena DeStefani, including PsychReviews, a searchable index of psychology book reviews.">'
---

## PsychReviews

[{{< fa arrow-up-right-from-square >}} psychreviews](https://seredes.github.io/psych-reviews/){.btn .btn-pub .btn-sm target="_blank"}

A searchable index of book reviews published in psychology and adjacent
fields: cognitive science, psychiatry, and the philosophy of mind and
phenomenology. The index currently covers more than 56,000 reviews from over
50 journals, spanning 1851 to today, with filters by subfield, journal, and
year, and an RSS feed of new entries. Inspired by
[PhilReviews](https://philreviews.org). Each entry links to the review at
the publisher's site.
